title: A decade of work
summary: I first 'got into' programming back in 2003, or 2004. I can't remember the exact time, but it was at the point where Geocities and AngelFire were still a thing, as was Myspace. The in thing was to host your own phpBB forum and, much like people will do with forks on github, branc
